changes: Iteration 1: Baseline run with original verbose skill. regex-replace scored 82 due to line-number prefixes in output, missing TODO comment removal, and incorrect const/let usage.
Iteration 2: Rewrote SKILL.md to be concise and task-focused. Added explicit warnings about line numbers, const/let rules, and debug removal. regex-replace improved to 95 (var-replacement still 83%).
Iteration 3: Expanded const/let rules with specific examples (const for arrays with .push(), let for reassigned variables). regex-replace dropped to 92 (debug-removal regressed to 67%).
Iteration 4: Added stronger emphasis on removing ALL debug lines completely and verifying output. Debug removal fixed to 100%, but var-replacement dropped to 83% (model broke for-loop variable).
Iteration 5: Added concrete before/after code transformation example showing all changes together. Both tasks achieved 100/100.
